mapper.select: select (case when gender = 1 then '男性员工' when gender = 2 then '女性员工' end) as name, count(*) as value from emp group by gender
select (case when job = 1 then '班主任' when job = 2 then '讲师' when job = 3 then '学工主管' when job = 4 then '教研主管' when job = 5 then '咨询师' end) as job, count(*) as value from emp group by job
